title: Semantic Analogies
code:
import numpy as np

def find_analogy(a, b, c, word_matrix, vocab_list):
    target = b - a + c
    scores = np.dot(word_matrix, target) / (np.linalg.norm(word_matrix, axis=1) * np.linalg.norm(target))
    return vocab_list[np.argmax(scores)]

if __name__ == '__main__':
    print('Analogy calculation module compiled.')
